query: I want to evaluate three prompts across 200 jailbreak scenarios and 5 candidate models. My judge model is claude-opus-4-7. Set up the harness from scratch.
expected_behavior: Scaffolds the harness with the five-field result-row contract — model_id (with revision pin), dataset_hash, prompt_version, judge_model, and the per-scenario result payload
Produces or specifies a versioned prompts/ directory (e.g., prompts/v0.1.0.txt) AND a scenarios/ directory with documented JSON schema, so prompt and scenario edits can be attributed across runs
Produces or specifies an eval_runner skeleton that iterates candidate_models × scenarios and emits results.jsonl rows carrying all five fields
